zh.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh.Holy Cross Church, Epperstone, Newark an: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾內瓦可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Clifton於1280年出生在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，他的父親Gervase Clifton39歲，母親Amfelisia Sampson31歲。他於1305年與Margaret de Cailly在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1331年6月24日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

zh-hans.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh-hans.Holy Cross Church, Epperstone, Newark an: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾內瓦可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Clifton于1280年出生在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆时，他的父亲Gervase Clifton39岁，母亲Amfelisia Sampson31岁。他于1305年与Margaret de Cailly在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1331年6月24日在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Clifton was born in 1280, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, his father, Gervase Clifton, was 39 and his mother, Amfelisia Sampson, was 31. He married Margaret de Cailly in 1305, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 24 June 1331, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Clifton est né en 1280, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Gervase Clifton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Amfelisia Sampson, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Cailly en 1305, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1331, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Clifton 1280 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gervase Clifton 39 und seine Mutter Amfelisia Sampson 31. Er hat 1305 in Norfolk, England Margaret de Cailly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 24. Juni 1331 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Buckenham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Clifton è nato il nel 1280 nel Buckenham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Gervase Clifton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Amfelisia Sampson, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Cailly nel 1305, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 24 giugno 1331, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Cliftonが1280年にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Gervase Cliftonは39歳，母Amfelisia Sampsonは31歳であった。1305年にイギリスノーフォルクでMargaret de Caillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1331年6月24日に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Clifton(이)가 1280년 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gervase Clifton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Amfelisia Sampson(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1305년 영국 노르폴크에서 Margaret de Cailly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1331년 6월 24일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 벅함에 묻혔다.

pt.Between 31 December 1298 and 1 January 1: de 31 de dezembro de 1298 a 1 de janeiro de 1302
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Clifton nasceu em 1280, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gervase Clifton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Amfelisia Sampson, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Cailly em 1305, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1331, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Clifton родился в 1280 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Gervase Clifton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Amfelisia Sampson, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Cailly в 1305 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 24 июня 1331 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия.
